overall_summary: Mapping correctly identifies the log-based discovery mechanism (1.4) and remediation process (1.2) aligned with AM-04's reconciliation and ownership assignment actions. Rule 9 exception for reconciliation controls (Change 1) was correctly applied to treat 1.4 as coverage rather than prerequisite. No false negatives detected due to mechanism class constraints (Log vs Scan). Note: System rules text contains a typo (1.5 DHCP) but mapper correctly used catalog ID 1.4.

per_mapping_verdicts.judge_note: Rationale links ownership assignment to unauthorized asset remediation intent under Rule 5. Specific enough to justify PARTIAL mapping.
Correctly applies Rule 9 exception for reconciliation controls (Change 1); mechanism class (log-based) matches AM-04 'log repository' requirement.
